description: Elevate the overall design to international luxury standard. Improve typography, spacing, animations, and visual hierarchy. Add a Bespoke Booking flow section, enhance the Lookbook with a more magazine-style layout, and add luxury polish throughout (parallax effects, gold accent animations, refined card hover states). Ensure the site tells a compelling brand story worthy of a luxury Nigerian fashion house.
steps: Enhance src/index.css with additional luxury utility classes: Add a .text-shimmer class (gold shimmer text animation for headings), a .border-glow class (subtle animated gold border glow for featured cards), a .parallax-slow class for parallax scrolling. Refine the .luxe-image hover state to include a subtle scale + brightness shift. Add a .section-divider class that renders a decorative gold line with diamond/dot accents on each end.

Enhance src/components/Hero.tsx: Make the hero more commanding - add a subtle parallax scroll effect on the background decorative elements. Add a thin gold line animation that draws on load. Make the stats bar more prominent with a frosted glass card treatment. Update the pill badge to say 'Luxury Bespoke Couture' instead of just the location.

Create a new component src/components/BookingCTA.tsx - a luxury 'Book Your Bespoke Experience' section. This is a full-width call-to-action section with a rich background (dark with gold accents). It should include: a headline like 'Begin Your Bespoke Journey', a brief description of the consultation process, and a prominent WhatsApp booking button. Add subtle animated gold particles or a gold gradient border animation. Place it after the Craftsmanship section in App.tsx.

Enhance src/components/Collections.tsx: Add a larger featured/hero card for the first featured design (make it span 2 columns on desktop). Add a subtle gold shimmer overlay on card hover. Improve the empty state with a more luxurious illustration/icon treatment.

Enhance src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Add subtle gold quote marks as decorative elements. Add a slight parallax offset between cards. Make the testimonial cards feel more premium with a thicker left gold border accent.

Enhance the overall spacing and section transitions: Update src/components/PressStrip.tsx to have a more refined 'editorial' feel with larger typography and a subtle scroll-triggered fade. Add smooth section transition decorators (gold horizontal rules with small diamond shapes) between major sections by updating the relevant section components.

Add the BookingCTA component to App.tsx after Craftsmanship (or after Services) - the flow should be: Hero > Marquee > Collections > PressStrip > About > Craftsmanship > BookingCTA > Services > StyleQuiz > Testimonials > Faq > Newsletter > Contact > Footer.
acceptance_criteria: New BookingCTA.tsx component exists with luxury styling and WhatsApp deep-link
Hero section has enhanced animations and a more commanding presence
Collections has a featured hero card treatment for the first featured design
At least 2 new CSS utility classes added to index.css for luxury effects
The overall site flow includes the new BookingCTA section
npx tsc -b passes with zero errors
findings: All changes build cleanly. The BookingCTA is placed after Services and before StyleQuiz. The section-divider CSS class uses pseudo-elements with flex layout which works well with Tailwind @apply directives. Featured designs now have a gold top border and badge in the grid.
